name: 8p11_22_FGFR1_SD
description: 8p11.22-p11.23 region containing FGFR1 with flanking SDs implicated in recurrent 8p11.2 microdeletion syndrome and 8p11 myeloproliferative neoplasms (FGFR1 fusion). Also harbors WHSC1L1/NSD3.

architecture.internal_structure: Moderate SD blocks (~30-80 kb) flanking FGFR1; substrate for rare ~5 Mb deletions and translocation breakpoints producing FGFR1 fusion oncoproteins.
